paper.title: Establishing Best Practices for Building Rigorous Agentic Benchmarks

sources.label: arXiv abstract
sources.notes: Live web verified paper identity and benchmark-checklist framing.

sources.label: PDF
sources.notes: Future full OCR target for section/page locator.

reference_repo_influences: paper2code: benchmark claims are classified separately from implementation changes.
DeepPaperNote: human report keeps ABC as methodology evidence, not C6 completion.
MinerU-Document-Explorer: future batch exploration can index PDF checklist sections.
paper-qa: benchmark issue claims should be citation-grounded before OpenSpec text.
MinerU: PDF extraction is the right next pass for exact page locators.
docling-mcp: fallback conversion is enough for checklist text extraction if MinerU is unavailable.

maformac_insertion_points.recommendation: Add fake-green audit dimensions before any aggregate quality claim.
Future CLI output should separate parse/tool/no-call/readback/judge/infra gates.
Cases should assert observable state/readback outcomes, not only generated text.
Readback remains execution proof and must not be replaced by judge text.

openspec_candidates: Future C6 requirement: aggregate pass SHALL NOT mask any hard layer failure.
Future C6 design note: every benchmark case must specify task outcome validity and empty/no-op handling.

gate.rationale: Most important P0 source for preventing C6 fake green and invalid benchmark reward design.
stop_conditions: No C6 rewrite without OpenSpec acceptance.
No aggregate pass if a hard layer fails.
No judge-text override of state/readback truth.

residual_risks: Full PDF page-level source locator still pending.
ABC checklist must be translated into MAformac-specific failure classes.
